title: cyperus corymbosus var. subnodosus
intro: Cyperus corymbosus var. subnodosus, also known as the small-flowered umbrella sedge, is a type of plant belonging to the sedge family. Traditionally, this plant has been used in various cultures for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Cyperus corymbosus var. subnodosus include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support digestive health. In herbal preparations, this plant is often used as an infusion or in tincture form to harness its medicinal properties.
